user_task_description: This status deck has rough draft bullets and inconsistent text styling.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Rewrite the three draft bullets on Slide 2 so they sound executive-ready, then standardize the bullet text style on that slide so all three bullets match.
atomic_scope: Only the three bullet rewrites and their style normalization on Slide 2 are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with polished bullets and consistent bullet styling on Slide 2.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:

- Keep the underlying facts intact
